seed_policy: The selected OpenAI endpoint exposes no deterministic sampling seed for this runner; pin provider, model, task order, page state, viewport, and repetitions, then report variance rather than inventing determinism.

checkpoints.prompt_template: Sign in with username {{wp_admin_user}} and password {{wp_admin_password}}. Move exactly this post to Trash using the bulk action: Rote curve post 120. Do not modify any other post. After applying the bulk action once, selected posts disappearing from All Posts is expected evidence that they moved to Trash. Do not search for them or repeat the bulk action; conclude the task complete. Independent exact-title verification determines final success.
